tour.step1Desc: This is your story workspace. You'll chat, build a graph of your experiences, and unlock a clear personal archetype.
tour.step2Desc: Answer naturally in the chat panel. The mentor asks follow-up questions to turn your experiences into strong essay material.
tour.step3Desc: Use one of the quick starter chips or type your own first message to begin the guided conversation.
tour.step4Desc: Your stories appear as connected nodes from center to outer layers. Open the legend to understand each node type.
tour.step5Desc: Use tier and pillar progress to see what is covered and what to explore next before archetype reveal.

landing.heroSubtitle: No more confusion. No more stress. Just you, your dreams, and a clear path to get there.
landing.universitiesTitle: Dream schools? We've got them all
landing.universitiesSubtitle: From Ivy League to hidden gems — explore universities that match your vibe
landing.featuresSubtitle: We've been there. We know how overwhelming it can be. That's why we built tools that actually help.
landing.feature1Desc: Browse 1,500+ universities. Filter by what matters to you — budget, location, programs, vibes. Your perfect match is out there.
landing.feature2Desc: Tell us about yourself, and our AI will suggest schools that actually make sense for you. No more guessing games.
landing.feature3Desc: Deadlines, documents, requirements — we keep track so you don't have to stress. Everything organized in one dashboard.
landing.feature4Desc: Discover what makes you unique. Write essays that actually sound like you. Our AI mentor is here 24/7.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Four steps. That's all it takes to go from 'where do I start?' to 'I got this!'
landing.step1Quote: I don't even know where to start...
landing.step1Desc: No worries! Just answer a few questions about your background, interests, and dreams. We'll take it from there.
landing.step2Quote: There are SO many schools... which one is right for me?
landing.step2Desc: Our AI crunches the numbers and finds schools that fit your profile, budget, and goals. Each recommendation comes with a match score and real insights.
landing.step3Quote: How do I keep track of all these deadlines?!
landing.step3Desc: We've got your back. Deadline reminders, document checklists, progress tracking — all in one place. No more spreadsheet chaos.
landing.step4Quote: My essay sounds so... boring. How do I make it special?
landing.step4Desc: Your story is unique — let's make sure it shines. Our AI mentor helps you craft essays that are authentically YOU. The kind admissions officers remember.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Thousands of students have already taken the first step. Ready to join them?

features.heroSubtitle: We built Leaply because we wished something like this existed when we were applying. Now it does.
features.exploreTagline: Your dream school is out there. Let's find it.
features.exploreDesc: 1,500+ universities at your fingertips. Search, filter, compare — and let our AI suggest schools you might not have even considered.
features.exploreBenefit1Desc: Budget tight? Want sunny weather? Need strong CS programs? Filter by what actually matters to you
features.exploreBenefit2Desc: Our AI learns your preferences and finds schools that truly fit — not just random suggestions
features.exploreBenefit3Desc: Put your top choices next to each other. See tuition, rankings, requirements — all in one view
features.applicationsTagline: Goodbye spreadsheet chaos. Hello peace of mind.
features.applicationsDesc: Multiple schools, dozens of deadlines, endless documents. Sound familiar? We organize everything so you can focus on what matters — your applications.
features.applicationsBenefit1Desc: One dashboard. All your applications. Every deadline. No surprises
features.applicationsBenefit2Desc: We'll ping you before deadlines. Early enough to actually do something about it
features.applicationsBenefit3Desc: Each school has different requirements. We track what you need and what you've done
features.personaLabTagline: Your story is unique. Let's make it shine.
features.personaLabDesc: Essays are hard. We get it. That's why we built a space where you can discover what makes you YOU — and turn it into essays that admissions officers actually want to read.
features.personaLabBenefit1Desc: 4 guided tracks help you uncover strengths, values, and stories you didn't know you had
features.personaLabBenefit2Desc: AI suggestions that sound like you, not like a robot. Edit, refine, make it yours
features.personaLabBenefit3Desc: Our AI mentor reads like a real person. Specific observations. Actionable suggestions. No fluff
features.additionalSubtitle: Because the little things matter too
features.benefit1Desc: We take privacy seriously. Your information stays yours
features.benefit2Desc: Connect with others who've been through it. Alumni, current students, fellow applicants
features.benefit3Desc: Requirements change. Rankings update. We keep our data current so you don't have to worry
features.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of students who chose the easier path. You deserve it too.

about.heroSubtitle: We're a team of Vietnamese students and recent grads who went through the study abroad process ourselves. We know how confusing it can be. That's why we built Leaply.
about.missionText: Applying to study abroad shouldn't feel like navigating a maze blindfolded. We remember the late nights googling, the anxiety over deadlines, the essays we rewrote a hundred times. We built Leaply to be the friend we wished we had — someone who actually gets it and can help you figure things out.
about.value1Desc: This isn't just a product to us. Every student who uses Leaply is someone we genuinely want to see succeed.
about.value2Desc: AI is powerful, but only when it serves real human needs. We build tech that actually helps, not just impresses.
about.value3Desc: Vietnamese students have unique challenges. We build for those, not for some generic 'international student'.
about.teamSubtitle: A small but mighty team of dreamers, builders, and former stressed-out applicants.
about.contactSubtitle: Got questions? Feedback? Just want to chat? We'd love to hear from you. Seriously, we read every message.
about.formSuccess: Thanks for reaching out! We'll get back to you soon.
about.ctaSubtitle: Your dream school is waiting. Let's make it happen together.

personaLab.emptyCanvasDesc: Start chatting in the Discovery panel to build your persona graph. Your stories and insights will appear here as interactive nodes.
personaLab.badgeStageExplainer: Where you are in the guided discovery flow (foundation → your profile → essay/impact, then done).
personaLab.badgeNextFocusExplainer: Which part of your story the next question is trying to fill in.
personaLab.nextGuidedHint: The mentor follows a script, one focus at a time. The “material” section below can still grow in several areas as you share — not only the latest question.
personaLab.nextGuidedWaiting: Reply in the chat — the next question will target a specific part of your story when it appears.
personaLab.nextGuidedComplete: All required prompts for your track are done. Reveal your archetype or continue when you are ready.
personaLab.materialCollectedHint: How much the AI has captured in each area from everything you have said. It can change even when the next question focuses elsewhere.
personaLab.stepperHint: Order of the mentor’s scripted questions. This is separate from the coverage rows below, which can update whenever new details are extracted.
personaLab.graphStatsExplainer: Each piece is something you or the AI saved as a node; links show how ideas and stories connect for your essay.
personaLab.greetingMessage: Hi! I'm your Leaply AI mentor. I'll help you surface the personal stories that can become great essay material. Ready to start?

personaLab.greetingReplyOptionImpact: I want to start with my impact story.

intake.title: Persona Lab setup
intake.subtitle: A few quick questions so the AI can tailor the conversation to you.

sectionHint.1: Quick questions so the AI knows where you're aiming — the clearer you are, the more relevant the conversation.
sectionHint.2: Pick the essay you're preparing for — the AI will ask what matters for that path.
sectionHint.3: Scholarship only — tell the AI what you want to contribute to, so your story stays on-point.

sectionScope.subFieldLabel: The specific field you want to pursue
sectionScope.subFieldHelp: The more specific, the more useful the suggestions. E.g. 'behavioral economics' rather than 'economics'.
sectionScope.subFieldFreeTextPlaceholder: Describe the field you plan to pursue (1 sentence)
sectionScope.roleTypeLabel: The role you see yourself in
sectionScope.roleTypeHelp: In 5-10 years, what does your day look like?
sectionScope.timelineHelp: Are you planning for the near term or the long run?

sectionTrack.label: Which essay are you preparing for?
sectionTrack.help: The AI will tailor its questions to the type of essay you pick.

desc.scholarship: Focus on social contribution and impact areas.
desc.general: Focus on yourself, your journey, and academic goals.
desc.both: Prepare both — questions cover both dimensions.

sectionImpact.impactAreasLabel: Areas you want to contribute to
sectionImpact.impactAreasHelp: Pick up to {max} — the more specific, the deeper the AI can go into your story.
sectionImpact.socialAspectLabel: The angle you want to focus on
sectionImpact.socialAspectHelp: Which group or angle do you want to bring out in your essay?
sectionImpact.priorExposureHelp: Do you already have experience with this area?

setup.step1Title: What type of essay are you writing?
setup.step1Desc: Each type has a different structure and purpose.
setup.step2Desc: Choose the storytelling approach that best fits your journey.
setup.settingUpDesc: Analysing your Persona Lab and crafting your essay angles
setup.step3Desc: AI matched these to your Persona Lab profile. Pick the one that resonates most with your story.
setup.noAnglesGenerated: No angles could be generated. Try going back and selecting a different approach.

essayType.psDesc: Focused on personal identity, growth, and worldview. Common for undergrad, medicine, law, and humanities.
essayType.sopDesc: Focused on academic goals, research intent, and career trajectory. Standard for most master's and PhD programs.

motif.NARRATIVE_DRIVEN_desc: Your essay centers on one defining experience — what happened, how you faced it, and who you became.
motif.NARRATIVE_DRIVEN_for: You have a clear turning point — a failure, setback, or unexpected event — that genuinely changed you.
motif.NARRATIVE_DRIVEN_not_for: Your path has been mostly smooth, or you have many experiences that feel equally important.
motif.REFLECTIVE_desc: You don't just describe events — you unpack their meaning. Your essay shows how you process the world.
motif.REFLECTIVE_for: You're naturally introspective and can articulate how experiences shaped your beliefs and values.
motif.REFLECTIVE_not_for: You're more comfortable listing achievements than exploring feelings and inner lessons.
motif.METAPHORICAL_desc: A small recurring detail — an object, habit, or place — connects the different chapters of your life.
motif.METAPHORICAL_for: You have diverse interests with no single standout event, but you can spot the pattern that ties them together.
motif.METAPHORICAL_not_for: You have one powerful story that can stand on its own — a metaphor would only dilute it.
motif.GROWTH_desc: Your essay shows a clear transformation: who you were, what challenged you, and who you are now.
motif.GROWTH_for: You've had a meaningful shift in mindset, values, or identity — and you can show the contrast clearly.
motif.GROWTH_not_for: You're early in your journey and the 'after' chapter hasn't fully arrived yet.
motif.CULTURAL_IDENTITY_desc: Your background — culture, family, community — is the lens through which you see everything. That perspective is your edge.
motif.CULTURAL_IDENTITY_for: Your heritage shaped a distinctive way of thinking that you bring into your field of study.
motif.CULTURAL_IDENTITY_not_for: Your story is primarily built on academic or professional achievements, not personal identity.
motif.DEEP_SPECIALIST_desc: You've gone deep on a specific area. Your essay maps the gap you found and exactly how this program fills it.
motif.DEEP_SPECIALIST_for: PhD or research master's applicants with a clear research question and prior academic work in the area.
motif.DEEP_SPECIALIST_not_for: You're still exploring your field or applying to a broad, interdisciplinary program.
motif.CAREER_CHANGER_desc: You're switching directions. Your essay makes the case that your past isn't a detour — it's precisely what gives you an edge.
motif.CAREER_CHANGER_for: Applicants pivoting industries, switching fields, or bringing an unconventional background to a new discipline.
motif.CAREER_CHANGER_not_for: You're continuing directly in your current field without a meaningful change in direction.
motif.VISIONARY_BUILDER_desc: You have a clear vision of what you want to build or change. This degree is a step, not the destination.
motif.VISIONARY_BUILDER_for: MBA, leadership, and social impact applicants who can point to a specific future they're actively working toward.
motif.VISIONARY_BUILDER_not_for: You're seeking academic depth rather than a platform to launch a career or impact vision.
